items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the persona scenario related to photo documentation at a job site. However, the evidence provided does not confirm whether the system supports this specific functionality or how it behaves under these conditions. The linked use case primarily discusses the intake form process without detailing the outcomes or validations related to the photo documentation scenario, leading to an inconclusive status.
